hero.text: Believe in the power of your dreams.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today is a powerful day for taking the initiative and pursuing new adventures.
aries.love: Romantic sparks may fly as you connect on a deeper level.
aries.career: Expect a boost in productivity; your efforts will be recognized.

taurus.general: Stability is key today; focus on the constants in your life.
taurus.love: Take a slow and steady approach in your relationship.
taurus.career: A financial opportunity may present itself, so stay alert.

gemini.general: Communication is essential; share your thoughts openly.
gemini.love: A surprise message could ignite emotional warmth.
gemini.career: Teamwork is highlighted; collaborate with others for success.

cancer.general: Self-care is important today; nurture your emotional health.
cancer.love: Be open about your feelings to strengthen your bond.
cancer.career: Your empathy will help resolve conflicts at work.

leo.general: Your charisma shines brightly; be bold in your endeavors.
leo.love: Passion defines your romantic life; enjoy the moment.
leo.career: Opportunities for leadership will arise, seize them.

virgo.general: Attention to detail will pay off in your daily tasks.
virgo.love: Practical gestures can spread love today.
virgo.career: Organize your workload to boost efficiency.

libra.general: Harmony is essential; strive to create balance around you.
libra.love: Your partnerships will benefit from open communication.
libra.career: Networking could lead to advantageous collaborations.

scorpio.general: Today urges you to dive deep into your passions.
scorpio.love: Intense emotions may lead to transformative experiences.
scorpio.career: Your investigative skills will assist in uncovering new insights.

sagittarius.general: A sense of adventure is in the air; explore new horizons.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity will add excitement to your love life.
sagittarius.career: Embrace change; it could lead to growth opportunities.

capricorn.general: Discipline and responsibility will guide your day.
capricorn.love: Share your aspirations with your partner for a deeper connection.
capricorn.career: Hard work now will set the stage for future achievements.

aquarius.general: Innovation is key; think outside the box.
aquarius.love: Your uniqueness will attract positive attention in your relationships.
aquarius.career: Collaborative projects will thrive with your input.

pisces.general: Your creativity flows; channel it into your projects.
pisces.love: Emotional connections deepen through shared experiences.
pisces.career: Trust your intuition when making decisions.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
professional.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: You can't build a reputation on what you are going to do.
professional.author: Henry Ford

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
motivation.author: Charles Kingsleigh

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
motivation.author: Arthur Ashe

motivation.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivation.author: Winston S. Churchill

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

captions.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Technology like art is a soaring exercise of the human imagination.
tech.author: Daniel Bell

tech.text: The great myth of our times is that technology is communication.
tech.author: Libby Larsen

fun.text: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down!
I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me Kit-Kat ads.
Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Did you hear about the mathematician who’s afraid of negative numbers? He will stop at nothing to avoid them.
I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is not the absence of doubt but the courage to go on.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: The best way to find yourself is to lose yourself in the service of others.
faith.author: Mahatma Gandhi

faith.text: All our dreams can come true, if we have the courage to pursue them.
faith.author: Walt Disney

faith.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
faith.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

wisdom.text: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates
